turns.text: Hi, this is an AI assistant calling on behalf of Medx, the senior-living placement service. Is this a good time to chat for two minutes?
Sure. I'm the owner of Sunset Ridge.
Great. We can either set up a follow-up call or send an info pack by email — both?
Both would work. Email me at owner@sunset.example.com and call me back Thursday at 2 PM.
Confirming — owner@sunset.example.com and a callback Thursday at 2 PM, correct?
